property_description: Located at the corner of Aliso Viejo Parkway and Pacific Park Drive, this three-building campus office environment offers 125,745 square feet of premier space suitable for a wide variety of users. Its contemporary design expertly mixes natural stone elements with glass and stainless steel accents. The dramatic, cantilevered front awnings and warm lobbies provide a welcoming environment for tenants and visitors alike. Large, efficient floor plates lay out well for smaller, multi-tenant users or larger single-occupancy users. Town Center Corporate Park offers ample and convenient surface parking at 4 cars per 1,000 square feet, and is richly landscaped with quiet outdoor seating areas. It is served by the Aliso Viejo Town Center offering a wide variety of shops and restaurants including Opahs, Chilis, Macaroni Grill, Wahoos, Staples, Barnes & Noble and more. In addition, the Marriott Renaissance ClubSport hotel and fitness facility sits just up the street. For more information regarding Town Center Corporate Park, or any of our other outstanding properties, please visit SheaProperties.com. Excellent access to the 73 Toll Road or the 5 and 405 Freeways.
